summary: Complete French translation verification of MatchPulse frontend. All 14 pages and 6 key components have been successfully translated to French. No remaining English text found on any visible page element (excluding proper nouns like team names, player names, league names).

context_for_next_testing_agent: Complete French translation verification completed. All 14 pages (Home, Login, Register, ForgotPassword, Dashboard, Profile, Matches, MatchDetail, Predictions, Collection, PackOpening, Trading, Leaderboard, DailyChallenge) and 6 components (Navbar, BetSlip, CommentSection, DailyLogin, NotificationBell, MatchCard) verified to be in French. Proper nouns (team names, player names, league names like 'Premier League') remain in English as expected.
